seo.title: Availability | ArdenNest - Book your stay
seo.description: Check availability and book directly. Best price guaranteed, no OTA commissions. Personal welcome by the owner.

whyDirect.title: Why book direct?
benefits: Best price guaranteed - no OTA commissions

availability.title: Check availability

preferTalk.title: Prefer to talk first?
preferTalk.description: No problem! Feel free to contact Bieke for questions or to discuss the options.

payment.title: Secure payment
payment.description: Payments are processed via Mollie, a reliable Dutch payment provider. Your data is always secure.

afterBooking.title: After your booking
steps: You'll receive an immediate confirmation by email
We'll contact you personally within 24 hours
You'll receive a welcome package with all practical information
On arrival day, Christophe will be there to welcome you personally
